'''Bolpuhr''' was the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguard of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] at the beginning the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]<ref name="Vector Prime" /> as recompense for her and her brother [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] helping rebuild the Noghri homeworld of [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]] after its oppression under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Bolpuhr accompanied Leia on her mission to negotiate with [[Nom Anor]]. During the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]], he killed a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]] by beating a knife in it's sternum, saving the life of Leia Organa Solo. However, the same warrior killed him easily, cutting his chest and neck open. His death, however, horrified Leia to her very core—no one could kill a Noghri easily. He was replaced by [[Olmahk]] and [[Basbakhan]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'', his name is spelled '''Bolphur'''.
